items.headline: This Software Stock Is Down 52% in 2026. How AI Could Actually Save It.
items.summary: The design-software maker has been battered by fears of artificial intelligence disruption and a broad sector downturn.  The design software market faces unique risks, Radke conceded, as generative AI reduces the time and skill required for prototyping and ideation, in turn blurring the boundaries “of who a ‘designer’ is.”  Figma charges on a per-seat basis, factoring in both the total head count and the tier of paid license required to access specific tools.
items.why_it_matters: News may increase risk, valuation pressure, or negative sentiment.

items.headline: Jim Cramer on Adobe: “I Don’t Want You in It”
items.summary: Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) was among Jim Cramer’s stock calls on Mad Money, as he highlighted worthy space players and reviewed several of this year’s IPOs. items.headline: Adobe (ADBE) Launches AI Tools To Help Brands Compete Across Search And Commerce
items.summary: Adobe, listed as NasdaqGS:ADBE, has introduced Adobe Brand Visibility and new GenStudio features focused on AI-driven marketing and commerce media. The launch brings tools such as prompt analysis, automated brand optimization, and cross channel AI campaign insights to enterprise customers. These offerings are aimed at helping brands manage their visibility across AI search, content surfaces, and commerce media networks. Adobe is expanding its AI toolkit at a time when many marketers are...
